payment_terms: Upfront and milestone-based cash payments totaling $300,100 plus 8,500,000 common shares, with ongoing quarterly royalties of 2.5% of gross sales derived from the licensed patent.
termination_clauses: Automatic termination at the end of the 20-year term specified in Section 1
Royalty payments cease on a going-forward basis if Licensor undergoes a change of control (direct or indirect beneficial ownership of more than 50% of voting securities)
